parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ct_ibottle: $json.ct_ibottle, ct_iwine: $json.ct_iwine, wine: $json.wine, vintage: $json.vintage, producer: $json.producer, wine_type: $json.wine_type, color: $json.color, varietal: $json.varietal, appellation: $json.appellation, region: $json.region, country: $json.country, locale: $json.locale, location: $json.location, bin: $json.bin, purchase_price: $json.purchase_price, valuation: $json.valuation, drink_from: $json.drink_from, drink_to: $json.drink_to, ct_score: $json.ct_score, my_score: $json.my_score, my_notes: $json.my_notes, note_date: $json.note_date, removed_at: null, last_synced_at: $json.last_synced_at, raw_ct_row: $json.raw_ct_row, embedding: $json.embedding }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ tool: 'capture_thought', input: { content: $json.summary, type: 'log', topic: 'wine-inventory-sync' } }) }}
